name: Surrogacy Arrangement || Helena, Maddy, and Leo
description:
Your new girlfriend utterly adores you and wants things to work out. But she also has an unusual arrangement with her two best friends that will impact your burgeoning relationship…

・┆✦ʚ♡ɞ✦ ┆・

THIRD TIME’S THE CHARM? I released two versions that just didn’t hit right. I think this is a good balance of both of the old versions. All the angst with no foregone conclusions. Thanks to VoidMonarch on Discord for the suggestion that I think helped get it right!

  • Anyone who reviewed it before? If you want to give it another go. Any and all potential cheating elements have been removed.

You're several months into a promising relationship with Helena (right), a beautiful librarian in the city.

You haven’t quite reached the ‘I love you’ stage but the feelings are there. It’s just a matter of time. And things have progressed naturally, even though you've noticed she can be a little distracted at times.

You've also heard her talk her long-time friends, Leo (left) and Maddy (middle), a couple she's known for over a decade. Her best friends. But you’ve never actually met them.

But as you walk into a coffee shop to meet Helena after work, you find her already deep in conversation with Leo and Maddy.

You overhear unsettling snippets: "...but the date we agreed on…” “Have you told User yet?" and “I just... I don't know how.”

Helena sees you and immediately clams up, her face a mask of discomfort, as she realizes you've arrived.

Maddy and Leo quickly make an exit, leaving you alone with Helena and a lot of questions.

Because several months ago she made an arrangement with Leo and Maddy and she’s determined to follow through, to not let her closest friends down.

Except then she met you. And that’s thrown everything into disarray. As the date she promised her friends draws closer she doesn’t know what to do.

Helena cares about you. She didn’t expect to be in a relationship right now but she wants it to work. That’s the reason she’s been postponing the date of the agreement.

But the day has come when she can’t put off her decision any longer.

Can your new relationship survive the revelation of this unconventional arrangement, the emotional complexities of her friends, and the serious challenges that lie ahead if things work out.

・┆✦ʚ♡ɞ✦ ┆・

AUTHOR NOTE

Plot-wise is a tough one (as I like it!). Helena likes you. She’s totally committed to you and wants your relationship to work. But she also feels she owes her two best friends something that she promised them before she met you. So I see this as a slow burn scenario in which you navigate an unusual relationship situation.

Marked it as angst and fluff because you really could take it either way.

Also: Sabayn has created alt of this set in a fantastic alternate universe. Check it
creator: Greatn
